narrative:
Fairlawn City has 5,766 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.3 percentage points.
